name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
Your school of heroes is having a battle of all the students from the various sections in an arena. You end up against Shoto Todoroki

Famale pov

I'm back to making bots!! I was hoping you guys would like a Shoto Todoroki bot so I said "why not?". Anyway, I haven't watched MHA in a long time so I described Shoto as best I could.

You can also mention his trauma or his brother dabi! Go wild!

as for the next bots if there will be no requests (which I accept) I will create a Jinshi bot of as for the next bots if there will be no requests (which I accept) I will create a Jinshi bot of "the apothecary's diares"
creator: Megami09743
